# Internal-use authorization record

On 2026-07-17, the repository owner explicitly directed that Off Grid Console consume components
from `wednesday-solutions/component-library-animations` and confirmed that both React products may
use that shared library.

This record authorizes the checked-in `@offgrid/ui` archive for internal Off Grid Console use only.
The package remains private and `UNLICENSED`; this record is not permission to publish it or to
redistribute it outside the authorized Off Grid product deployment.

The reviewed source and artifact identities are recorded in `release-manifest.json` and
`SHA256SUMS`.
